name: baishou-next
description: 白守 Next — 以纯白誓约，守护彼此一生。

scripts.dev:mobile: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "日常开发：启动 Metro（只改 JS/TS；手机须已装开发版 APK）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile dev
scripts.dev:mobile:clear: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "全量重装：清 Metro/Gradle 缓存并重编安装 APK（升级 Expo、加原生模块、闪退时用；完成后执行 pnpm dev:mobile）。建议先卸载旧版 com.anonymous.mobile。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile dev:clear
scripts.mobile:fix: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "将 Expo 相关依赖对齐到当前 SDK（改 package.json 后建议执行）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile fix
scripts.mobile:export: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "导出 Android 离线包到 apps/mobile/dist。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile export:android
scripts.mobile:connect: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "USB 连接手机：adb reverse 并打开开发版（需另一终端已运行 pnpm dev:mobile）。" pnpm --filter @baishou/mobile connect
scripts.mobile:setup: node scripts/run-with-hint.mjs "首次克隆或升级 Expo 后：install → fix 依赖 → dev:mobile:clear 全量重装。" pnpm install && pnpm mobile:fix && pnpm dev:mobile:clear
